Definition (EN): ViewDefinition to present exposed model elements and their relationships, arranged in a rectangular grid.
Context/Example (EN): GeometryView is the generalization of the following more specialized views: Tabular view, Data value tabular view, Relationship matrix view

Definition (EN): ViewDefinition to present exposed features as nodes, nested features as nested nodes, and connections between features as edges between (nested) nodes.
Context/Example (EN): Nested nodes may present boundary features (e.g., ports, parameters).

Definition (EN): ViewDefinition to present time ordering of event occurrences on lifelines of exposed features.
Context/Example (EN): Valid nodes and edges in a SequenceView are: Features such as parts with their lifelines, Event occurrences on the lifelines, Messages sent from one part to another with and without a type of flow, Succession between event occurrences, Nested sequence view (e.g., a reference to a view), Compartments

Definition (EN): ViewDefinition to present states and their transitions.
Context/Example (EN): Valid nodes and edges in a StateTransitionView are: States with nested states, Entry, do, and exit actions, Transition usages with triggers, guards, and actions, Compartments on states

Definition (EN): MetadataItem is the most general class of Items that represent Metaobjects.
Context/Example (EN): MetadataItem is the base type of all MetadataDefinitions.

Equivalent (JP): メタデータアイテム群
Definition (EN): metadataItems is the base feature of all MetadataUsages.
Context/Example (EN): metadataItems is the base feature of all MetadataUsages.

Definition (EN): This package contains a reflective SysML model of the SysML abstract syntax.
Context/Example (EN): This package contains a reflective SysML model of the SysML abstract syntax.
